newsletter_description: Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss any news or an interesting offer.
newsletter_privacy: By subscribing to our newsletter, you agree to receive promotional emails from us. You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in the footer of our emails.
newsletter_toast_error: Please fix the errors in the form.
email_prefs_description: Select the types of emails you would like to receive from us. You can change these preferences at any time.
email_prefs_organizer: Organizer messages (e.g. organizational info, transfers, etc.)
email_prefs_events: Event messages (e.g. invitations to matches or concerts, ticket offers, etc.)
sms_prefs_description: Select the types of SMS messages you would like to receive from us. You can change these preferences at any time.
unsubscribed_title: We're sorry to see you go.
unsubscribed_body: Unsubscription was successful. From this moment, you will not receive email marketing.
login_terms: By clicking continue, you agree to our {termsOfService} and {privacyPolicy}.
nav_frequency_info: The setting for the frequency of mobile message delivery will apply to all users
domain_dns_delay: DNS changes may take up to 24 hours to propagate. We refresh the status automatically every hour.
domain_dkim_description: DKIM record configuration for domain verification
domain_dmarc_description: DMARC record configuration for domain protection
domain_spf_description: SPF is added automatically — no need to add it manually
domain_drawer_sending_domain_body: A sending domain is the domain used in the From: address of your emails. Authenticating it proves to receiving mail servers that you are authorized to send on behalf of that domain, which dramatically improves deliverability and protects your brand from spoofing.
domain_drawer_dns_body: You need to add three types of records to your domain's DNS zone.
domain_drawer_dkim_body: DKIM attaches a cryptographic signature to every outgoing message. The receiving server fetches your public key from DNS and verifies the signature, confirming the email was not tampered with in transit.
domain_drawer_dkim_step1: Copy the Host and Value shown on this page.
domain_drawer_dkim_step2: In your DNS provider, create a new TXT record with those values.
domain_drawer_dkim_step3: Propagation can take up to 24 hours. Use the Re-check all button to refresh the status.
domain_drawer_dmarc_body: DMARC tells receiving servers what to do when a message fails DKIM or SPF checks — for example, reject it or send it to spam. It also enables aggregate reports so you can monitor who is sending email from your domain.
domain_drawer_dmarc_minimal: A minimal policy to get started:
domain_drawer_dmarc_tighten: Once you are confident in your setup, tighten the policy to p=quarantine or p=reject.
domain_drawer_spf_body: SPF lists the mail servers permitted to send email for your domain. Our platform adds the required SPF entry automatically — you do not need to create it manually. If you already have an SPF record, we will merge our entry into it.
domain_drawer_trouble_not_found: Record not found — double-check there are no extra spaces in the host name and that the record type is TXT.
domain_drawer_trouble_unverified: Still unverified after 24 h — some registrars cache DNS for up to 48 hours. Try a public checker like MXToolbox to confirm the record is live.
domain_drawer_trouble_spf: Multiple SPF records — a domain must have exactly one SPF TXT record. Merge all include: entries into a single record.
security_description: Security settings apply to all users
reply_email_dialog_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete {email}? This action is irreversible.
event_events_search: Search event by name or ID...
event_dialog_copy_description: Are you sure you want to duplicate {event}?
event_dialog_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete {event}? This action is irreversible.
